description: This file is a Spring Boot REST controller class (`LoanApplicationDraftController`) that handles API endpoints for managing loan application drafts, including creation, listing, retrieval, updating, patching sections, readiness checks, submission, decisioning, and deletion. It leverages annotations for request mapping, Swagger documentation, validation, and security. The class interacts with service classes to perform business logic related to loan draft workflows.

classes.name: LoanApplicationDraftController
classes.description: Spring Boot REST controller for handling loan application draft operations such as create, list, get, update, patch sections, check readiness, submit, run decisioning, and delete.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates a new loan draft for the authenticated user.

methods.name: list
methods.description: Lists all loan drafts belonging to the authenticated user.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Retrieves a specific loan draft by ID if owned by the user.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Replaces fields of an existing draft, supports optimistic concurrency.

methods.name: patchSection
methods.description: Partially updates a specific section within a draft.

methods.name: readiness
methods.description: Checks if a draft is ready for submission based on sections and documents.

methods.name: submit
methods.description: Submits a draft if it is ready, changing its status to submitted.

methods.name: decide
methods.description: Runs risk scoring and decisioning for a draft, assigns a decision outcome.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Deletes a draft if owned by the user and not submitted.

methods.name: subjectAsUserId
methods.description: Extracts the user UUID from the Authentication token.
